summary: Iteration 60: Enrollment Form Changes & Excel Export - All features working correctly. Tested relationship dropdown (7 new options added), online/offline notify behavior, first-time/soul-tribe radio buttons, referral dropdown conditional visibility, and Excel export endpoints.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing program 5 (Quad Layer Healing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enrollment form at /enroll/program/:id is fully functional with all new features. Key data-testids: p-relation-0 (relationship dropdown), p-first-time-0 (first time button), p-soul-tribe-0 (soul tribe button), p-referral-0 (referral dropdown), p-notify-0 (notify checkbox - only visible in offline mode). Excel exports work at /api/inbox/download and /api/clients/export/csv.

online_mode_notify.description: Golden message displayed, no checkbox shown, notify auto-enabled

offline_mode_notify.description: Checkbox shown, golden message hidden, notify is optional

first_time_button.description: Button visible with gold styling when selected

soul_tribe_button.description: Button visible with purple styling when selected

default_first_time.description: First time is selected by default

referral_dropdown_conditional.description: Visible when First time selected, hidden when Soul Tribe selected

UI: Online mode hides notify checkbox
